script:
#!/bin/bash
set +e
echo '=== ts ==='; date -u +%FT%TZ
echo '=== bot health snapshot - last outbound per bot ==='
for pair in \
  "mskai:/home/azureuser/.mskai-bot" \
  "yooai:/home/azureuser/.yooai-bot" \
  "yooopenai:/home/azureuser/.yooopenai-bot" \
  "afrah:/home/afrah/.afrah-bot" \
  "aixa:/home/aixa/.aixa-bot" \
  "alejandro:/home/alejandro/.alejandro-bot" \
  "ashley:/home/ashley/.ashley-bot" \
  "axel:/home/axel/.axel-bot" \
  "cameron:/home/cameron/.cameron-bot" \
  "david:/home/david/.david-bot" \
  "emily:/home/emily/.emily-claude-bot" \
  "gabriel:/home/gabriel/.gabriel-bot" \
  "heather:/home/heather/.heather-bot" \
  "jesusr:/home/jesusr/.jesus-reyes-bot" \
  "jose:/home/jose/.jose-bot" \
  "kaye:/home/kaye/.kaye-bot" \
  "lia:/home/lia/.lia-bot" \
  "neil:/home/neil/.neil-bot" \
  "neilc:/home/neilc/.neil-claude-bot" \
  "rosi:/home/rosi/.rosi-bot" \
  "stephanie:/home/stephanie/.stephanie-claude-bot" \
  "zahid:/home/zahid/.zahid-bot"; do
  name="${pair%%:*}"; d="${pair#*:}"
  if [ -f "$d/outbound.jsonl" ]; then
    last=$(tail -1 "$d/outbound.jsonl" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c 'import sys,json
try:
  o=json.loads(sys.stdin.read())
  txt=(o.get("text","") or "")[:80].replace(chr(10)," ")
  is_fallback="Had trouble" in txt
  is_ack="On it" in txt
  tag="FALLBACK" if is_fallback else ("ACK" if is_ack else "REAL")
  print(o.get("ts","?"), "|", tag, "|", txt)
except Exception as e: print("parse-err", e)' 2>&1)
    printf '  %-12s %s\n' "$name:" "$last"
  else
    printf '  %-12s NO OUTBOUND FILE (%s)\n' "$name:" "$d"
  fi
done
echo '=== bot+responder service health ==='
for svc in $(systemctl list-units --type=service --state=running --no-legend --no-pager 2>&1 | awk '{print $1}' | grep -E '(bot|responder)\.service' | sort); do
  state=$(systemctl is-active "$svc" 2>&1)
  printf '  %-45s %s\n' "$svc" "$state"
done
echo '===END==='
